overview: TravelERP Pro is a luxury SaaS Travel Accounting ERP for travel agencies featuring agency onboarding, refund invoices, multi-supplier vouchers, PDF exports, email notifications, and a comprehensive admin panel — all wrapped in a black-and-gold glassmorphism UI.
features: Agency onboarding flow for first-time setup
Refund invoices with automatic credit note and ledger reversal
Multi-supplier hotel vouchers with split amounts
PDF export for invoices and vouchers
Email notifications for payments and refunds
In-app notification bell with unread count
Enhanced super-admin panel with live stats and activity log
Full profile management for all user roles
